messages.content: Hi
Hello! How can I assist you today?
如何用地道的英语翻译数据与机理融合的模锻结构件残余应力场分区推断方法
How to translate the method of inferring residual stress field partition in forged structural components integrating data and mechanisms into authentic English?
如何用地道的英语翻译“数据与机理融合的模锻结构件残余应力场分区推断方法”

To translate "数据与机理融合的模锻结构件残余应力场分区推断方法" into authentic English, you can say:

"The method of inferring residual stress field partition in forged structural components integrating data and mechanisms."
如何用地道的英语翻译“数据与机理融合的模锻结构件残余应力场推断方法”

The translation of "数据与机理融合的模锻结构件残余应力场推断方法" into authentic English can be:

"The method for inferring residual stress field in forged structural components through the integration of data and mechanisms."
The translation of “航空整体结构件是构成飞机机体的主要部件，其制造质量直接影响飞机的综合性能。” into authentic English

The translation of "航空整体结构件是构成飞机机体的主要部件，其制造质量直接影响飞机的综合性能" into authentic English can be:

"Aircraft integral structural components are the main parts comprising the aircraft fuselage, and their manufacturing quality directly influences the overall performance of the aircraft."
The translation of “作为构成飞机机体的主要部件，航空整体结构件的制造质量直接影响飞机的综合性能。” into authentic English
As major components of aircraft fuselage, the manufacturing quality of aerospace integral structural components directly impacts the overall performance of the aircraft.
The translation of “模锻件是航空整体结构件的主要毛坯来源之一。” into authentic English
"Forged parts are one of the primary sources of raw materials for aerospace integral structural components."
The translation of “模锻件是航空整体结构件的主要毛坯来源之一，因其具有良好的力学性能。” into authentic English
"Forged parts are one of the main sources of raw materials for aerospace integral structural components, as they possess excellent mechanical properties."
The translation of “模锻件是航空整体结构件的主要毛坯来源之一，其成形过程使其具有良好的力学性能、抗疲劳性能与使用寿命。”

"Forged parts are one of the main sources of raw materials for aerospace integral structural components, and their forming process endows them with excellent mechanical properties, fatigue resistance, and service life."
The translation of “模锻件是航空整体结构件的主要毛坯来源之一，其成形过程使其具有良好的力学性能、抗疲劳性能与使用寿命。”into authentic English

"Forged parts are one of the primary sources of raw materials for aerospace integral structural components, and their forming process imparts excellent mechanical properties, fatigue resistance, and service life."
The translation of “但复杂的生产工艺也为模锻件的后续加工带来了巨大的挑战。”into authentic English
"But the complex production process also brings great challenges to the subsequent processing of forged parts."
The translation of “模锻件是航空整体结构件的主要毛坯来源之一，其主要通过模具对材料进行挤压成形”into authentic English
"Forged parts are one of the primary sources of raw materials for aerospace integral structural components, mainly formed by extrusion of the material through molds."
The translation of “模锻过程可以有效的优化材料的微观组织结构，形成完整的金属流线”into authentic English
"The forging process can effectively optimize the microstructure of the material and form a complete metal flow pattern."
The translation of “但模锻的生产工艺也使模锻件的残余应力水平高、分布复杂，为模锻件的后续加工带来了巨大的挑战。”into authentic English
"However, the production process of forging results in high levels of residual stress and complex distribution in forged parts, posing significant challenges for subsequent processing."
The translation of “复杂且高水平的应力将使模锻件在机械加工后出现弯曲、扭转以及弯扭组合等复杂的加工变形。”into authentic English
"The complex and high-level stresses can cause complex deformation such as bending, twisting, and combined bending-torsion in forged parts after machining."
The translation of “根据2017年美国海军航空系统调查 ，由加工变形导致的铝锻件报废率高达22%。”into authentic English
"According to a 2017 investigation by the United States Navy Aviation Systems, the scrap rate for aluminum forgings due to processing deformation reached as high as 22%."
The translation of “模锻件的加工变形控制问题已成为制约飞机研制与量产的重大瓶颈。”into authentic English
"The issue of controlling processing deformation in forged parts has become a major bottleneck in aircraft development and mass production."
The translation of “残余应力是导致零件发生加工变形的主要原因，模锻结构件初始残余应力场的测量对加工变形的分析与控制具有重要的作用。”into authentic English

"Residual stress is the primary cause of processing deformation in components, and the measurement of the initial residual stress field in forged structural components plays a crucial role in the analysis and control of processing deformation."
The translation of “根据目前残余应力相关研究，获取残余应力场的方法主要有三种：残余应力数值模拟技术，残余应力测量技术与残余应力场推断技术。”into authentic English

"According to current studies on residual stress, there are mainly three methods for obtaining the residual stress field: numerical simulation of residual stress, measurement techniques for residual stress, and inference techniques for residual stress field."

The translation of “随着计算机技术的快速发展，以有限元法为代表的数值模拟技术已广泛应用于金属塑性成形过程分析，通过模拟材料的生产过程，预测不同工艺下的材料性能，对积极推进产品设计、工艺工装设计的科学性具有重要价值，有效提高锻件制造的效率、降低成本。数值模拟技术通过仿真模锻件生产工艺，获取模锻件的残余应力场，成为分析模锻件残余应力场的重要手段。”into authentic English

"With the rapid development of computer technology, numerical simulation techniques, represented by the finite element method, have been widely used in the analysis of metal plastic forming processes. By simulating the production process of materials and predicting material properties under different processes, it holds significant value in promoting the scientific aspects of product design and process tooling design, effectively improving the efficiency and reducing costs of forging manufacturing. Numerical simulation techniques, by simulating the forging process, are considered an important means for obtaining the residual stress field of forged components and analyzing the residual stress field."
The translation of “以有限元法为代表的数值模拟技术已广泛应用于金属塑性成形过程分析”into authentic English
"Numerical simulation techniques, with the finite element method as the representative, have been widely used in the analysis of metal plastic forming processes."
The translation of “数值模拟技术，如有限元法，已广泛应用于金属塑性成形过程分析”into authentic English
"Numerical simulation techniques, such as the finite element method, have been widely applied in the analysis of metal plastic forming processes."
The translation of “数值模拟技术通过模拟材料的生产过程，预测不同工艺下的材料性能”into authentic English
"Numerical simulation techniques simulate the production process of materials to predict material performance under different processing methods."
The translation of “通过模拟材料的生产过程，数值模拟方法可以模拟不同工艺下的材料性能。模拟结果对积极推进产品设计、工艺工装设计的科学性具有重要价值，可以有效地提高模锻件的制造效率、降低成本。”into authentic English

"By simulating the production process of materials, numerical simulation methods can simulate material performance under different processing methods. The simulation results hold significant value in promoting the scientific aspects of product design and process tooling design, effectively improving the manufacturing efficiency and reducing costs of forged components."
The translation of “通过模拟材料的生产过程，数值模拟方法可以模拟不同工艺下的材料内部的残余应力场。模拟结果对积极推进产品设计、工艺工装设计的科学性具有重要价值，可以有效地提高模锻件的制造效率、降低成本。”into authentic English

"By simulating the production process of materials, numerical simulation methods can simulate the residual stress field inside the material under different processing methods. The simulation results hold significant value in promoting the scientific aspects of product design and process tooling design, effectively improving the manufacturing efficiency and reducing costs of forged components."
The translation of “Hai 等使用了有限元技术获得了7050铝合金模锻件的残余应力，再采用逐层法、轮廓法与X射线衍射法分别对模锻件进行测量，通过对比发现有限元仿真结果与X射线衍射法测量结果比较吻合，与逐层法与轮廓法的结果有较大偏差。”into authentic English

"Hai et al. used finite element technology to obtain the residual stress of a 7050 aluminum alloy forged component. Subsequently, layer removal method, contour method, and X-ray diffraction method were employed to measure the forged component. A comparison revealed good agreement between the finite element simulation results and X-ray diffraction measurement results, whereas significant deviations were observed when compared with the results from the layer removal and contour methods."
The translation of “Hai 等使用了有限元技术获得了7050铝合金模锻件内部的残余应力场。并将获得的残余应力场与通过残余应力测量方法（包括逐层法、轮廓法与X射线衍射法）获得的进行对比。通过对比发现有限元仿真结果与X射线衍射法测量结果比较吻合，与逐层法与轮廓法的结果有较大偏差。”into authentic English

"Hai et al. used finite element technology to obtain the residual stress field inside a 7050 aluminum alloy forged component. They compared the obtained residual stress field with the results obtained through residual stress measurement methods (including layer removal, contour, and X-ray diffraction methods). A comparison revealed good agreement between the finite element simulation results and the results obtained from X-ray diffraction measurement. However, significant deviations were observed when compared with the results from the layer removal and contour methods."
The translation of “Ortmann-Ishkina 等开发了旋转模锻工艺的2D FEM模拟，并揭示了E355钢管在整个纵向截面上残余应力分布的规律，最后用X射线衍射法对残余应力进行了实际测量，结果表明模拟结果与X射线衍射法测量结果具有良好的一致性。”into authentic English

"Ortmann-Ishkina et al. developed a 2D FEM simulation for the rotary forging process and revealed the distribution pattern of residual stress throughout the longitudinal cross-section of an E355 steel tube. Subsequently, residual stress was measured using X-ray diffraction analysis, and the results demonstrated good agreement between the simulation and X-ray diffraction measurement."
The translation of “Ortmann-Ishkina 等开发了旋转模锻工艺的2D FEM模拟，并揭示了E355钢管在整个纵向截面上残余应力分布的规律。同样的，他们也将有限元仿真结果与X射线衍射法测量结果进行对比，对比结果表明两者具有较好的一致性。”into authentic English

"Ortmann-Ishkina et al. developed a 2D FEM simulation for the rotary forging process and revealed the distribution pattern of residual stress throughout the longitudinal cross-section of an E355 steel tube. Similarly, they compared the finite element simulation results with the results obtained from X-ray diffraction analysis, and the comparison indicated good consistency between the two."
